title: BEM-761 verify fresh state
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 18:57 (UTC+3)'
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except: return {}
lint=load('governance/state/workflow_lint_gate_state.json')
b759=load('governance/state/bem759_diagnose_current_lint_gate_failure.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
watch=load('governance/state/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.json')
responses=[]
for d in [Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt'),Path('governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor')]:
    if d.exists():
        for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
            if p.is_file():
                txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
                low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower(); up=txt.upper()
                if 'bem732' in low or 'bem-732' in low or 'bem728' in low or 'bem-728' in low or 'bem725' in low or 'bem-725' in low or 'multi-agent strategy' in low:
                    decision='MESSAGE'
                    if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
                    elif 'BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
                    elif 'APPROVED' in up or 'DECISION: APPROVE' in up: decision='APPROVED'
                    responses.append({'path':str(p),'decision':decision})
if b759.get('current_new_violation_count')==0:
    lint_status='current_repo_lint_clean'
else:
    lint_status='current_repo_lint_blocked'
status='fresh_state_checked_lint_clean' if lint_status=='current_repo_lint_clean' else 'fresh_state_checked_lint_blocked'
blocker=None if lint_status=='current_repo_lint_clean' else {'code':'CURRENT_REPO_LINT_BLOCKED','new_violations':b759.get('current_new_violations')}
state={'schema_version':'verify_after_fresh_lint_tick.v1','bem':'BEM-761','status':status,'lint_status':lint_status,'workflow_lint_gate_state_status':lint.get('status'),'bem759_current_new_violations':b759.get('current_new_violation_count'),'claude_runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'claude_runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'claude_outcome':runtime.get('claude_action_outcome'),'watchdog_status':watch.get('status'),'watchdog_checked_at':watch.get('checked_at'),'responses_found':len(responses),'responses':responses,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem761_verify_after_fresh_lint_tick.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem761_verify_after_fresh_lint_tick.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-761 | Verify After Fresh Lint Tick | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Current repo new lint violations: '+str(b759.get('current_new_violation_count'))+sep+'Runtime started: '+str(runtime.get('started_at'))+sep+'Responses: '+str(len(responses))+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem761_verify_after_fresh_lint_tick','status':status,'current_repo_new_lint_violations':b759.get('current_new_violation_count'),'responses_found':len(responses),'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem761_verify_after_fresh_lint_tick.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-761 '+status+' current_new_lint='+str(b759.get('current_new_violation_count'))+' responses='+str(len(responses))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Verified fresh lint state and Claude runtime state after BEM-760 tick')
"""
No issue comments.
